joke: Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
Alright, alright, no science. How about this: I told my wife she was drawing her eyebrows too high. She looked surprised.

Alright, tough room. Okay, here goes. A horse walks into a bar. The bartender says, "Why the long face?" The horse says, "I just lost my job, my wife left me, and my car got repossessed." The bartender says, "Well, don't take it personally."
